name: TRIZEL EPOCH_DRIFT_RESONANCE_STRUCTURE
definition: Epoch drift and resonance structure for the Solar–Lunar calendar cycle, derived from canonical inputs in TRZ-PHY-ASTR-001 and the rational ladder in TRZ-PHY-ASTR-003

epoch_drift.description: Excess of one TT tropical year over twelve synodic months; accumulated drift per solar cycle

resonance_structure.description: Residual drift after 391 solar years against 403 lunar-12 cycles; derived from the fast rational approximation 403/391
Residual drift after 3063 solar years against 3157 lunar-12 cycles; derived from the stable rational approximation 3157/3063

determinism_rule: If TRZ-PHY-ASTR-001 inputs change, this artifact must receive a version bump and a new Layer-1 validation artifact.
